message.content:
(1) Footer section is visible.  
(2) Not applicable (no testimonials).  
(3) Footer design: Dark background with a 3-column sitemap (GENERAL: Home/About/Projects/Blog; SPECIFICS: Guest Book/Bucket List/Uses/Attribution; MORE: Book a call/Links/RSS/Privacy/Terms) and a bottom bar with copyright text ("© 2026 Aayush Bharti. All rights reserved") and links (Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Sitemap).  
(4) Notable visual elements: Monogram "AB" logo, clean typography, structured sitemap columns, and a subtle dark theme.
